_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Khuluma umngani, ume ungene.
speakFriend.description: I-Liana Banyan yakhiwe ukuvula kulimi lonke. Ulimi ngalunye olukhululekileyo lunebhizi elilodwa lokuhumusha.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Uhlu lwezilwimi namazinga e-Marks okwethutyana. Marks amatokeni okuthatha inxaxheba, hayi izabelo.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Humusha i-Liana Banyan kwi-{{language}}. Fumana {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Igama ngalinye kule platform lanikezwa ibizo ngezizathu. Imvelaphi yamagama angama-26 abalulekile.
speakFriend.step2Body: Humusha zonke izichazelo ezidzingekayo. Thumela nge-Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Uma samukela, uthola Marks futhi urekhodi ku-IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Thi umngane, ungenele."

languageSwitcher.tip: Sebenzisa amagama aphasiwedhi ezilwimi ezahlukeneyo eMnyango kaDurin ukuvula amava amahlanu!
